sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n38512" key="e)peise/rrw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπεισ-έρρω</orth>, <sense id="n38512.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">rush in with ill luck to</tr_> one, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:9:158" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.158</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Suid.</author> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
